tasks.label: Agent: Init Shared DB
tasks.command: mkdir -p /Users/gensuminguyen/Kukanilea/data && sqlite3 /Users/gensuminguyen/Kukanilea/data/agent_orchestra_shared.db "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS global_context (key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'))); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS shared_directives (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, directive TEXT NOT NULL, priority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 100, active INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'))); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS domain_sync (domain TEXT PRIMARY KEY, status TEXT NOT NULL, last_action TEXT, last_commit TEXT, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now')));"

tasks.label: Agent: Migrate Shared DB
tasks.command: sqlite3 /Users/gensuminguyen/Kukanilea/data/agent_orchestra_shared.db "ALTER TABLE shared_directives ADD COLUMN priority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 100;" || true; sqlite3 /Users/gensuminguyen/Kukanilea/data/agent_orchestra_shared.db "ALTER TABLE shared_directives ADD COLUMN updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'));" || true; sqlite3 /Users/gensuminguyen/Kukanilea/data/agent_orchestra_shared.db "ALTER TABLE domain_sync ADD COLUMN updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'));" || true

tasks.label: Agent: Sync Read
tasks.command: sqlite3 /Users/gensuminguyen/Kukanilea/data/agent_orchestra_shared.db "SELECT 'GLOBAL_CONTEXT' AS section, key, value, updated_at FROM global_context ORDER BY updated_at DESC; SELECT 'SHARED_DIRECTIVES' AS section, id, directive, priority, active, updated_at FROM shared_directives WHERE active=1 ORDER BY priority ASC, updated_at DESC; SELECT 'DOMAIN_SYNC' AS section, domain, status, last_action, last_commit, updated_at FROM domain_sync ORDER BY updated_at DESC;"

tasks.label: Agent: Sync Write
tasks.command: sqlite3 /Users/gensuminguyen/Kukanilea/data/agent_orchestra_shared.db "INSERT INTO domain_sync(domain,status,last_action,last_commit,updated_at) VALUES('${input:domain}','${input:status}','${input:action}','${input:commit}',strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now')) ON CONFLICT(domain) DO UPDATE SET status=excluded.status,last_action=excluded.last_action,last_commit=excluded.last_commit,updated_at=excluded.updated_at; SELECT domain,status,last_action,last_commit,updated_at FROM domain_sync WHERE domain='${input:domain}';"

tasks.label: Agent: Add Directive
tasks.command: sqlite3 /Users/gensuminguyen/Kukanilea/data/agent_orchestra_shared.db "INSERT INTO shared_directives(directive,priority,active,updated_at) VALUES('${input:directive}',${input:priority},1,strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now')); SELECT id,directive,priority,active,updated_at FROM shared_directives WHERE active=1 ORDER BY priority ASC, updated_at DESC LIMIT 20;"
